$schema: OBRA brand palette — machine-readable companion to /brand/BRAND.md. All oklch values are source of truth; hex values are pre-computed sRGB-gamut-clamped equivalents (via the real OKLab<->linear-sRGB matrices, not approximated) for tooling that doesn't support oklch() (e.g. older Tailwind configs, design tools).

meta.contrastStandard: WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1 minimum for body text)

bg.role: App canvas / base surface — deep viridian-black

surface.role: First elevation step — cards, panels, the NFT plate mat

surfaceHigh.role: Second elevation step — active/featured cards, modals

border.role: Hairline borders (decorative, not a required-to-perceive signal) — also the NFT plate frame line

primary.role: Vermilion — CTAs, mint/acquire/list actions, pending state, the seal mark

extendedArtPalette.$comment: Collection-generator-only colors (contracts/art/generate.ts) — not core UI tokens, not used in app chrome. Cover the Paleta trait values that need a color beyond primary/secondary.

bone.role: Hueso y Tinta palette trait — warm bone neutral

gold.role: Dorada palette trait + Gold Sello variant

goldDeep.role: Gold accent shade, used in Espectro palette rotation

verifiedContrast.note: errorDeep fails AA as body text on bg (2.82:1) — errorDeep is fill-only, never used as standalone text/icon color. See BRAND.md 'Text-on-fill pairings' table for the exact approved text color per accent fill. primaryDeep and secondaryDeep pass AA but tightly (4.77 / 4.87) — avoid at small sizes as standalone text.

primaryDeep.note: Passes AA but tightly — avoid at small sizes, same caution as CHU's own primaryDeep.

secondaryDeep.note: Passes AA but tightly — avoid at small sizes.

display.note: Do not enable WONK or high SOFT — keep close to default/formal for the gallery register.

mono.note: Regular + italic only, no bold weight — use uppercase + letter-spacing + color for emphasis instead of font-weight.
